description_long: This is a modern-style bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a combination of large windows, a recessed entryway, and a small porch area with planters. The building is surrounded by a low stone wall and includes a spacious, rectangular lawn area in front. The exterior walls are primarily white with gray stone accents, and the windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical groupings. The rear of the bungalow has a large windowed section and a raised patio or balcony area. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, open space, and integration with the surrounding yard.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a small porch, and a spacious front lawn enclosed by a low stone wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white wall, flat roof, and a large green lawn bordered by a stone wall.
description_view_1: Rear side view with a mostly solid white wall and a glimpse of the garden and patio area.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the entryway, porch, planters, large windows, and the expansive lawn.
description_view_3: Back view showing the large windowed section, raised patio, and the full extent of the lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
